case_title: MATTHEW J CALDERZ VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERZ, MATTHEW J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT WRITTEN AUTHORIZATION FOR THE TOW WAS PROVIDED, BUT IS COVERED BY PLAINTIFF'S SIGNATURE ON THE WRONG LINE OF THE TOW RECEIPT. THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF CAR WAS TOWED MORE THAN ONE HOUR AFTER IT WAS PARKED IN THE LOT AND, AS SUCH, VC 22953(A) DOES NOT APPLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERZ, MATTHEW J AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-09-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFROE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY CALDERZ, MATTHEW J GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY CALDERZ, MATTHEW J AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.
